allow: PowerShell($dest = "c:\\Users\\user\\GitHub\\eevc.github.io\\assets\\images\\members"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dest -Force | Out-Null; $src = "C:\\Users\\user\\TeamFolder\\Documents\\vault\\EEVC\\Wiki\\Members"; $copies = @\( @{from="Jin-Hyun An\\JH_An.jpg"; to="jin-hyun-an.jpg"}, @{from="Sang-Joon Lee\\SJ_Lee.jpg"; to="sang-joon-lee.jpg"}, @{from="Min-Jae Song\\KakaoTalk_20251103_123944697.png"; to="min-jae-song.png"}, @{from="Seong-Bin Lee\\KakaoTalk_20260126_185834093_01.jpg"; to="seong-bin-lee.jpg"} \); foreach \($c in $copies\) { $f = Join-Path $src $c.from; $t = Join-Path $dest $c.to; if \(Test-Path $f\) { Copy-Item -Path $f -Destination $t -Force; Write-Output "OK $\($c.to\)" } else { Write-Output "MISS $f" } })
